member.name: T:Prime.FileService.DirectoryWrapper
member.summary: Wrapper class to wrap System.IO.File methods used in this file to be able to mock them for unit testing.

member.name: T:Prime.FileService.FileHandle
member.summary: FileHandle class implementation.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.FileHandle.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.FileHandle.#ctor(Prime.FileService.IFileWrapper)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: fileWrapper mock.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.FileHandle.Populate(System.String)
member.summary: Populate TBD.
member.param: path.

member.name: T:Prime.FileService.FileService
member.summary: Implementation for FileService class.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.FileService.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.FileService.#ctor(Prime.FileService.IFileWrapper)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class for UT.
member.param: fileWrapper mock.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.FileService.EnableLongPath(System.String)
member.summary: this function prepend the \\?\ Prefix to allow paths longer than 260 characters. for UNC paths (shared folders begins with "\\"), use the \\?\UNC\ prefix instead of just \\?\.
member.param: the input path.
member.returns: the updated path with the prefix.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.FileService.NormalizePaths(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a path to file or files, translate it's EnvironmentVariable to it's valid path value, handle double slashes and in case of @LATEST_REV@ token appears in the file path will call function to set the latest revision.
member.param: The path to normalize.
member.returns: Returns a list of normalized Paths.

member.name: T:Prime.FileService.FileWrapper
member.summary: Wrapper class to wrap System.IO.File methods used in this file to be able to mock them for unit testing.

member.name: T:Prime.FileService.IDirectoryWrapper
member.summary: Interface to wrap System.IO.File methods used in this file to be able to mock them for unit testing.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.IDirectoryWrapper.Exists(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a file exists.
member.param: folder full path.

member.name: T:Prime.FileService.IFileHandle
member.summary: IFileHandle for File Handle related operations.

member.name: P:Prime.FileService.IFileHandle.IsFileChanged
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the local file timestamp is changed since last read. Note that when the file is first read, it is returns as true.

member.name: P:Prime.FileService.IFileHandle.FilePath
member.summary: Gets the file path from local or remote SysC (if SysC service is up will use it as first option).

member.name: P:Prime.FileService.IFileHandle.FileName
member.summary: Gets the file name.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.IFileHandle.ReparseLocalFile
member.summary: If the file is changed, reparse local file from tester site.

member.name: T:Prime.FileService.IFileService
member.summary: IFileService for Files related operations.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.IFileService.TryGetFile(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a file from local or remote SysC (if SysC service is up will use it as first option). This function accepts relative path (used "." as first character), user vars (starting with '~') and full paths.
member.param: Path to an existing local or remote file.
member.returns: If the file exists, and the path to local temporary copy of the file or the same input if the file was already local.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.IFileService.IsSysCFileServiceUp
member.summary: Checks if SysC file service is up and running.
member.returns: True if SySC service is up and running. False - otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.IFileService.TryGetDriveNetworkMappingFromPath(System.String,System.Boolean@,System.String@)
member.summary: Attempts to retrieve the network mapping for a given drive path.
member.param: The path for which to find the network mapping.
Outputs a boolean indicating whether the drive is a network drive. True if it is, false otherwise.

Outputs the network path if the drive is a network drive. If the drive is not a network drive, this will be "LOCAL_DRIVE". If the drive does not exist or an error occurs, this will be an empty string.
member.returns: True if the drive is a network drive and the mapping could be retrieved, or if the drive is a local drive (indicated by "LOCAL_DRIVE"). Returns false if the drive does not exist or an error occurs during the retrieval process.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.IFileService.GetNormalizedPath(System.String)
member.summary: Returns normalized full path of a relative file path provided - (starting from "." as first character, ~HDMT_TPL_DIR , user vars and). As well resolves @LATEST_REV@ dynamic token in the file path When @LATEST_REV@ token appears in the file path , Prime will determine the revision directory by looking for a file called latest.txt (in the path instead of @LATEST_REV@ token). It expects the first line of the file to contain the name (and not the full path) of the revision directory. Prime will not check if the directory in the latest.txt file actually exists. If the directory does not exist, it will fail later during the test program when it tries to access files in the directory. the below mechanism Example: PUP_DOWNLOADS_DIR = "I:\ulat\cttr\release\icl\ICLXXDXH60UX\@LATEST_REV@" Prime will: 1. Replace @LATEST_REV@ token with latest.txt 2. Read the contents of I:\ulat\cttr\release\icl\ICLXXDXH60UX\latest.txt (for example it will return 1000) 3. Resolve the directory path as - I:\ulat\cttr\release\icl\ICLXXDXH60UX\1000.
member.param: Path to an existing local or remote file.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.IFileService.DirectoryExists(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a Directory exists either remotely (if SysC service is up) or locally. This function accepts relative path (used "." as first character), user vars (starting with '~') and full paths.
member.param: Path to folder to check for.
member.returns: True is file is found either remotely or locally, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.IFileService.GetLastModificationTimeUtc(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the last time this file was modified, it file is not found will return current time. This function accepts relative path (used "." as first character), user vars (starting with '~') and full paths.
member.param: Path to file to check for.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.IFileService.GetFileHandle(System.String)
member.summary: Create file handle for file handling operations, such as getting file path, checking is file changing, and reparse local file from tester site. Throw exception if file path is not valid.
member.param: Path to an existing local or remote file.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.IFileService.ReadAllLines(System.String)
member.summary: Gets all the lines for the file on given, remote or local.
member.param: The local or remote path to the file to read.
member.exception: Thrown if the file doesn't exist local or remotely.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.IFileService.ReadFile(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the file content on given, remote or local file.
member.param: The local or remote path to the file to read.
member.exception: Thrown if the file doesn't exist local or remotely.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.IFileService.PushFile(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Copy a file to a remote path.
member.param: Path to an existing local or remote file.
Path to the remote file path.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.IFileService.GetObjectFromJsonFile``1(System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes a JSON file into an object of the specified type. Optionally validates the JSON against a given schema file.
member.typeparam: The type of the object to which the JSON file should be deserialized.
member.param: The path to the JSON file to be deserialized.
member.returns: An instance of the specified type containing the data from the JSON file.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.IFileService.GetObjectFromJsonFile``1(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes a JSON file into an object of the specified type. Optionally validates the JSON against a given schema file.
member.typeparam: The type of the object to which the JSON file should be deserialized.
member.param: The path to the JSON file to be deserialized.
The name of the schema file against which the JSON should be validated. If empty or not provided, no validation will occur.
member.returns: An instance of the specified type containing the data from the JSON file.

member.name: T:Prime.FileService.IFileWrapper
member.summary: Interface to wrap System.IO.File methods used in this file to be able to mock them for unit testing.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.IFileWrapper.Exists(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a file exists.
member.param: File full path.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.IFileWrapper.GetLastWriteTimeUtc(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the last time this file was modified, it file is not found will return current time.
member.param: Path to the file.
member.returns: Returns the last time this file was modified.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.IFileWrapper.Copy(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Copies an existing file to a new file. Overwriting a file of the same name is not allowed.
member.param: The file to copy.
The name of the destination file. This cannot be a directory or an existing file.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.IFileWrapper.ReadAllLines(System.String)
member.summary: Reads the lines of a file.
member.param: The path of the file to read.
member.returns: list of strings of all the file's lines.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.IFileWrapper.ReadAllText(System.String)
member.summary: Opens a text file, reads all lines of the file, and then closes the file.
member.param: The path of the file to read.
member.returns: A string containing all lines of the file.

member.name: T:Prime.FileService.Internal.IFileService
member.summary: This is an internal interface for the IFileService, not intended for users.

member.name: M:Prime.FileService.Internal.IFileService.Initialize
member.summary: Initialize the service. This must be called in the initialize library test method.
